creator: andrey@scopenco.com
text:
Hello Jarrod,

this filter is default in Nagios.
I checked nagios mail list before sending this patch.
http://article.gmane.org/gmane.network.nagios.user/59410
http://article.gmane.org/gmane.network.nagios.user/59780
http://article.gmane.org/gmane.network.nagios.devel/5948

Seems this is strategy of nagios developers, not bug.

-- 
Andrey V. Scopenco
